description: Fragment from the top of a letter in Judaeo-Arabic, with the address in Arabic script on verso. Dating: ca. 12th century. Somewhat wide space between the lines. Not much of the content is preserved. From [...] b. Hārūn to Abū l-Ḥasan ʿAlī b. Hibatallāh. (The sender's full name is probably preserved.)
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
